title: thymus serpyllum f. hackelianus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. hackelianus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of creeping thyme include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Creeping thyme is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
